fixes: Adjusted theme toggle alignment in Header. Moved inside a grouped flex container with Profile Dropdown to prevent shifting to the center on large screens.
Fixed Sidebar layering issue on mobile. Increased z-index of aside and backdrop elements so they correctly overlay the navigation bar.
updates: Implemented full Password Reset & Recovery flow. Added state listener in AuthContext and success banner in SettingsPage.
Implemented secure account deletion via Supabase RPC (delete_my_account). Replaced placeholder contact alert with functional database execution.
Performed pre-launch log sanitization and code polish across contexts and pages.

fixes: Updated page title and SEO meta description in index.html for better brand visibility.
Verified and cleaned up core landing page assets to ensure no broken images on launch.
Ui fixes - removed hover effect from application, Homepage ui changes
updates: Performed a comprehensive pre-launch MVP audit covering security (RLS), performance, and mobile responsiveness.
Validated all habit check-in/streak calculation logic for local timezone accuracy.
Added Privacy and Terms and Sytatements pages in footer of Home page

fixes: Ui fixes - removed hover effect from application, Homepage ui changes
